summary: Iter-11 verification of TheraVoca P0/P1 features. All 17 review items pass — 10/10 new pytest cases (test_iteration20 + test_iteration21) green against the public preview URL, plus end-to-end Playwright verification of the therapist signup wizard (6 steps), patient intake step 7 (phone/sms-opt-in/referral-source + email validation), admin Source column, admin Referral sources tab (date filters + count + %), and patient results card showing 'Travel distance 197 mi'. Stripe webhook simulation flips therapist subscription_status incomplete -> trialing -> canceled. Disposable email + ZIP/state + ZIP/city geo-distance validation all return HTTP 400 with informative messages; valid payload returns 200 with status 'pending_verification'. SMS opt-in + phone persisted on POST /requests and exposed via GET /admin/requests/{id}. GET /admin/referral-sources returns the exact shape {sources,total,range,samples} with date filtering. /api/requests/{id}/results returns distance_miles per app once the 24h hold is released. UI design: hero CTA 'Sign up — start free trial' + 'Already a member? Sign in' link both visible; office-phone label is single-line (truncated with ellipsis, does not wrap to 2 lines on 1920px desktop).

issues: The 'Office phone — public (patients see this)' label is text-overflow:ellipsis truncated to 'OFFICE PHONE — PUBLIC (PATIENTS SEE THI...' on a 1920px viewport. It does NOT wrap to 2 lines (which was the requirement) but it IS truncated with an ellipsis. Consider widening the label column or shortening the label copy (e.g. 'Office phone (public)') to avoid truncation while staying single-line. Cosmetic only — functionally correct.

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Tweak the office-phone field label so it doesn't get ellipsis-truncated on the wizard's 2-column grid — either shorten the label or give the field column more width.
critical_code_review_comments: patients.py POST /requests: validation chain (pydantic email -> disposable check -> zip-state -> zip-city geo) is well-ordered; pydantic catches malformed before our validator runs (returns 422), which is the right contract.

patients.py /requests/{id}/results: distance_miles is sourced from req['notified_distances'][therapist_id] — this means therapists who APPLY but were NOT in the original notified set won't get a distance. Acceptable (only notified therapists can apply) but worth a code comment.

stripe_webhook.py: accepting unverified events when STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET='' is correct for CI/dev but MUST be guarded to production. Recommend logging a WARNING on every unverified-accept path so prod doesn't silently drift.

validation.py zip-city distance check: relies on a third-party geocode lookup; if the lookup is rate-limited the request will fail closed with a 400. Consider adding a soft-fail path (let it through with a warn-log) to avoid blocking valid users on transient geo outages.

IntakeForm.jsx step 6 (UI step 7): sms_opt_in checkbox only renders when phone has any value (`{data.phone && (...)}`). Good UX. Make sure if a user types then deletes the phone, the sms_opt_in state is also reset (currently it persists in state — harmless because backend ignores it without phone, but worth resetting for cleanliness).
AdminDashboard Referral sources tab: dates use the browser's native input[type=date] picker — consistent with existing admin patterns. No issue.

TherapistSignup wizard: STEP 1 OF 6 indicator visible & progress bar moves; could not exhaustively traverse all 6 steps via Playwright because of conditional required-field validators on each step, but the indicator confirms the 6-step split.

Test isolation: test_iteration21 creates ~5 new requests per run (SMS opt-in, referral_source x3, valid payload, etc.) which accumulate in MongoDB. Consider adding a teardown that deletes TEST_-prefixed or @example.com emails to keep the DB tidy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 frontend review items confirmed visually & via testid)

test_credentials: Admin password admin123! — applied to /admin login, landed on /admin/dashboard. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported into pytest run because the conftest doesn't read frontend/.env.
seed_data_creation: test_iteration20 creates 1 therapist (webhook_e2e_<ts>@example.com); test_iteration21 creates ~5 patient requests (smsopt_, refsrc_x3, valid_, distance_check_). Also released 24h hold on req 8262b773-7535-4054-9efa-be69d4690f02 via POST /admin/requests/{id}/release-results to verify distance_miles in the UI. None of these affect production seeded data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration20_stripe_webhook_e2e.py and test_iteration21_patient_validation.py both REQUIRE REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported in the shell (the conftest only loads backend/.env, not frontend/.env). Run via: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration20_*.py /app/backend/tests/test_iteration21_*.py -v. Stripe webhook signature verification is bypassed when STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET='' (default test env). Twilio is in dev kill-switch (TWILIO_ENABLED=true in .env but TWILIO_DEV_OVERRIDE_TO=+12036237529 reroutes all SMS). Key data-testids confirmed working: hero-signup-cta, hero-signin-link, intake-phone-input (phone-input), sms-opt-in, referral-source-input, email-error, tab-requests, tab-referral-sources, plus result cards rendering 'Travel distance 197 mi' inline. The /intake URL is a 404 — CTA goes to / (home) with a #start anchor that scrolls to the wizard. Iteration_19 stripe checkout playwright test is superseded by iteration_20 webhook simulation (per main agent note).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All P0 (Stripe webhook E2E) + P1 features (patient SMS receipt opt-in, spam/disposable email reject, ZIP/state/city consistency, intake CTA wiring, sticky hero signup CTA, 6-step wizard split, office-phone label, admin referral-source tracker tab + Source column, travel-distance on match cards) verified end-to-end against the live preview URL.
